test.command: cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && npx vitest run && cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/extension && npx vitest run

typecheck.command: cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.server.json

nonBlockingIssues.description: Upload handling reads each file into memory with `await file.arrayBuffer()` and has no explicit size guard, which can increase memory-pressure risk on very large uploads.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update typecheck guidance to use app workspace commands (`cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.server.json`) instead of root-level `npx tsc`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer observation cites mismatch between `.factory/skills/app-worker/SKILL.md` and `.factory/services.yaml`, and this mismatch was also previously observed in worker handoff.
